title: Introduction
description: NOC 00015 – Senior managers - construction, transportation, production and utilities | GTR Immigration NOC 00015 encompasses the senior leadership driving Canada’s physical infrastructure and industrial output. From overseeing massive construction projects to managing national transportation networks and utility grids, these TEER 0 executives are foundational to Canada’s economic growth. For immigration, this role is a top target for Trade and STEM-focused Express Entry draws, offering a seamless transition for high-level technical leaders.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category0 – Management occupationsTEER Level0Major Group00 – Legislative and senior management occupationsSub-Major Group000 – Legislative and senior management occupationsMinor Group0001 – Senior management occupationsNOC Code00015

duties: Plan, organize, direct, control, and evaluate the operations of companies in construction, transportation, or utilities.
Establish objectives for the organization and develop or approve policies and programs.
Direct the preparation of financial statements and reports.
Coordinate the work of regions, divisions, or departments.
Approve and lead major project bids and contract negotiations.
employment_requirements: A university degree in engineering, business administration, or a related field is required.
Extensive experience (10+ years) in the specific industry, including several years in a middle-management role, is mandatory.
job_outlook: The outlook is Favourable. Projections indicate a consistent need for senior leadership to manage the increasing complexity of global supply chains and modernized utility networks.
labour_market_demand: The demand is Very Good, driven by Canada’s record-breaking infrastructure spending and the green energy transition. Senior managers in utilities (Renewables/Nuclear) and construction (Housing/Transit) are seeing unprecedented recruitment activity in Ontario, BC, and Alberta.
Infrastructure Boom: Lead iconic projects like the GO Transit expansion or major renewable energy grids.
Sustainability Focus: Drive the shift toward net-zero production and green transportation.
Resilient Industries: Work in sectors that are essential to the nation's daily functionality.
pathways: Express Entry (STEM & Trade Category Draws): Targeted invitations for high-level technical leaders.
BC PNP Skills Immigration: Direct pathways for senior managers in the primary resources and construction sectors.
JobMaze Executive Access: Specialized recruitment support for LMIA-supported executive roles.
